## Manual test checklist
- [ ] App loads locally
- [ ] Main changed flow works as expected
- [ ] Error/invalid input path is handled
- [ ] No unrelated behavior regression observed

## Security review (required for auth/actions/uploads)
- [ ] Input validation reviewed
- [ ] Authorization/ownership checks reviewed
- [ ] CSRF coverage reviewed (for POST actions)

## Documentation updates
- [ ] Updated docs under `docs/` if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `docs/implementation-status.md` if phase/status changed
